name: Ebenova Legal Docs MCP
description: Generate professionally drafted legal documents via AI — NDAs, freelance contracts, tenancy agreements, privacy policies, and 30 more document types across 18 jurisdictions including Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, UK, US, and Canada. Also extracts document fields from WhatsApp and email conversations.

tools.name: generate_legal_document
tools.description: Generate a professionally drafted legal document. 34 types across 18 jurisdictions including Nigeria, Kenya, UK, US, Canada.

tools.name: generate_invoice
tools.description: Generate professional invoices, receipts, proforma invoices, and credit notes. 12 currencies supported.

tools.name: extract_from_conversation
tools.description: Extract structured legal document fields from a WhatsApp, email, or chat conversation. Optionally auto-generate the document.

tools.name: analyze_scope_creep
tools.description: Detect scope violations in a client message against an original contract. Returns violation types, severity, and 3 professional response drafts.

tools.name: generate_change_order
tools.description: Generate a formal change order document when client requests additional work beyond original contract scope.

tools.name: list_document_types
tools.description: List all 34 supported legal document types grouped by category.

tools.name: check_usage
tools.description: Check monthly document quota usage and remaining documents.

secrets.name: EBENOVA_API_KEY
secrets.description: Your Ebenova API key. Get a free key at https://ebenova.dev/dashboard
